vibe: A pristine, highly functional digital drafting board. Minimal UI that stays out of the way, focusing entirely on the canvas content.

spacing_layout.top_bar: absolute top-4 left-4 right-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50 pointer-events-none
spacing_layout.top_bar_items: pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-2
spacing_layout.bottom_toolbar: absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-1 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-full px-3 py-2
spacing_layout.context_menu: absolute z-50 pointer-events-auto flex flex-col gap-2 bg-white border border-black/5 shadow-lg rounded-2xl p-3 w-48

toolbar_button.base: p-2.5 rounded-full transition-all duration-200 flex items-center justify-center relative group

canvas_selection_box.handle: w-3 h-3 bg-white border-2 border-[#0055FF] rounded-sm shadow-sm

ui_components.color_picker_swatch: w-6 h-6 rounded-full border border-black/10 cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 transition-transform

implementation_rules.canvas_engine: Strongly recommend using 'react-konva' and 'use-image' for the canvas rendering, shape management, and transformations (Transformer component in Konva makes selection/rotate/scale trivial).
implementation_rules.pwa: Include a manifest.json and a basic service worker for offline support. App must cache assets and run disconnected.
implementation_rules.storage: Use localforage or direct IndexedDB for auto-saving the board state (JSON). Base64 images must be stored within the JSON structure or as separate blobs referenced in the JSON.
implementation_rules.screen_capture: Implement using navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({ video: true }). Draw the first captured frame to a hidden canvas, extract the dataURL, and add it to the board as an Image object. Stop the stream immediately after capture.
implementation_rules.grid_background: Implement the dot grid using a CSS background on a div behind the canvas: background-image: radial-gradient(#E5E5E5 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; Map background-position to the canvas pan offset, and background-size to the zoom level.
implementation_rules.testing: All UI buttons must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='tool-pen', data-testid='btn-capture').
implementation_rules.accessibility: Floating UI elements must be keyboard navigable. Popovers should trap focus where applicable. Use Radix UI / Shadcn for Dialogs (Save/Load/Clear) and Popovers (Color/Stroke pickers).

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up a full-screen React application with no scrolling (overflow-hidden) on the body.
Install react-konva and konva for the canvas layer, as building an infinite canvas with select/scale/rotate from scratch with pure HTML5 canvas is error-prone and slow.
Implement the floating UI overlay using absolute positioning on top of the Konva Stage.
For the tools (Pen, Shapes, etc.), maintain an active state in a context or custom hook.
When an object (Image, Text, Shape, Scribble) is selected, show the bounding box with standard Konva Transformer, styled to match the #0055FF brand color.
Handle image pasting via window 'paste' event (clipboardData) and read it as a Base64 URL to insert into the canvas.
Implement screen capture button using getDisplayMedia, take one frame, and insert.
For the PWA, ensure next.config.js (or Vite plugin pwa) is configured properly to generate a manifest and SW.
Strictly follow the styling in the design_guidelines for the UI to keep it minimal and high-contrast.
